MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RED_TEARSTONE.desc: Allies with less than 10% HP deal 25% additional damage.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-MARTIAL_AMULET.des: Upon pickup, add all allies' Strikes to your deck.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-POISONERS_KIT.desc: Allies can enchant their attacks with Poison at rest sites.
OPTION_POISON.title: Poisoner's Kit
